## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits 1.0.0](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) with an allowed scope (`gateway`, `auth`, `ui`, `chart`, `pkg`, `docs`, `adr`, `ci`, `deps`, `repo`).
- [ ] `task lint` passes.
- [ ] `task test` passes.
- [ ] Relevant ADRs updated / added under `docs/adr/` when architectural decisions change.
- [ ] Roadmap / CHANGELOG updated if user-visible.
